name: Jaron Clark
bio: Jaron is the face behind Premier Entertainment: a modern violinist who leads with artistry and professionalism. He represents the caliber of talent we book for weddings, corporate events, festivals, and luxury venues across the country.

name: LEO LUX
bio: High-energy DJ sets tailored to your crowd—perfect for receptions, clubs, and brand activations.

name: Ennis One Man Band
bio: Full-band sound with a solo footprint—ideal when you want impact without a large footprint on stage.

name: Craig & Ennis
bio: Dynamic duo performances that bring chemistry and versatility to weddings, private events, and stages that demand presence.
